titleStmt.title: SII 9.165: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 165. (A.R. No. 213 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 24, Pramāthin, Jyēshṭha, śu. paurṇamāsī, Ādityavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1099 June 5 Sunday, when there was a lunar eclipse, and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva, under whom Surēśvara-Paṇḍitadēva was ruling Beṇṇevūr twelve. It records the grant of land and taxes on grass, firewood, vegetables, fruits and cotton exported from and imported into the village Kuṟuvatti, together with a money grant, for the service of the god Abhinava-Sōmēśvara and for feeding ascetics in the temple, made by the two-hundred Mahājanas of the village with their chief Kāḷidāsa, in the presence of Lakuḷīśvara-Paṇḍita. It describes the genealogy of the Daṇḍanāyaka Kāḷidāsa and the warlike and religious spirit of the two-hundred learned Brāhmans of Kuṟuvatti. Kāḷidāsa is described as a Brāhman of Viśvāmitra-gōtra and is called gōtra-pavitra. Lakuḷīśa-Paṇḍita's spiritual teachers are also named. The record has excellent poetical merits. It is stated to have been composed by Śrīkaṇṭhasūri. The engraver was Kaḷōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
namastāmrajaṭājāḷabāḷapallavaśāḷinē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhapūrṇnakuṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuva
namalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunā
nuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpanna vibudhajanamanōbhivāṁcchitaphaḷasamutpanna dīnānāthajaṭheradāvapāvakanivāraṇa duritagajamadanivā
raṇa nijasamayasaṁrakṣaṇaikadakṣa Anavaratasubhikṣa paṇḍitacūḍāmaṇi śiṣṭajanacintāmaṇi śrīvādidēvapaṇḍitadēvapādāradhana
labdhavaraprasāda parōpakāravinōda . Ityādināmāvaḷīsamāḷankṛtarappa śrīmatsurēśvarapaṇḍitadēvaru beṇnevūrppanneraḍumaṁ su
khadināḷuttamire Ā nāḍoḷagrahāraṁ bhūnārīhāramadhikavibudhādhāraṁ śrīnārigiralagāraṁ bhūnidhi kuṟuvartti nōḍe sogayisuti
rkku . Intu negaḻdagrahārābhyantikadoḷu tuṁgabhadre paścimamukhadiṁ santatavāhiniyenelintinteṁdī grāmavibhavamaṁ baṇniparār .
Ī grāmamanūroḍeyananagrasukhaṁ jñātivargadirddirvvarggentagrēsaranoldittanudagramanaṁ kāḷidāsadaṁḍādhīśa . vṛtta . bhuvanavinūtakīrttivanitāpri
yaneṁdu parōpakāriyeṁdavanatapāḷanaikapaṭuveṁdu dharāmarapūjyaneṁdu mānavanayaśāḷiyeṁdasamasāhasaneṁdu vinītaneṁdu bāndhavasu
rabhūjamendavani baṇnisutirppudu kāḷidāsana . sutrāmasamaṁ vibhavadoḷatrīkṣaṇajātanannanāśritajanadoḷu gōtrapavitraṁ viśvāmitrānvayavārddhi
caṁdraneṁdeḷe pogaḷguṁ parahitadoḷu vidyādharaparivṛḍhaṁ svāmibhaktiyoḷu pavanajanaṁ paramaudāryyadoḷaṁgēśvarananadhaḥkarisi kāḷidāsannagaḻdaṁ .
vṛtta . tattanayarssamastaguṇasaṁyutaralliyumōrvva sūnu lōkōttamaniṣṭabāṁdhavajanāvasathaṁ guṇi sōmanāthanatyuttamavṛttarātanoḍavuṭṭidarirvva
rumilli gaṁḍarādityanumāśritāṁburuhamitrarenalu dhare barmmadēvanu . Ā negaḻdasōmanāthana sūnu sucāritranamaḷaguṇagaṇapātraṁ sānuna
yaṁ manujaroḷabhimānadhanaṁ kāḷidāsaniṣṭāvāsa . Intūroḍeyapramukhaṁ santatavinnūrvvarabaḷaraṁ pāḷisutaṁ haṁtṛgaḷammūḷisi niścintaṁ sukhadiṁdamiṟda
rārjjitadharmmar . Innūrvvara prabhāvamanenneṁdigaraḷave baṇnisalu bhāvipoḍā pannagavarana pitāmahanannarggamatarkkyamendoḍāvaṁ pogaḷvaṁ . vṛtta . śaraṇā
yātajanakke vajrakavacammāṟāṁte vīraṁge kēsari bāyiviṭṭeredaṁge kalpamahījaṁ śāstrakke tānāspadaṁ puruṣārtthakke tavar śṛtismṛtige tāṁ līḷāgṛ
haṁ dharmmadākaramintī kuṟuvarttivarttimahidēvānīkaminnūrvvaru . prabhumodalāginnūrvvara śubhakarmmadinilli tuṁgabhadrātaṭadoḷu vibu
dhābhinavasōmēśaṁ bhubhumakuṭanighṛṣṭacaraṇayuganudiyisida . vṛtta . tribhuvanasaṁbhavasthitilayaṁgaḷigōrvvane kartṛveṁdu sanda bha
vinikāyasaṁsaraṇaghōramahārnnavakarnnadhāranandabhinayipanta dakṣiṇasurāpageyoḷu nerayalke bandanoldanabhinavasōmanātha
namarōtkaranāthananāthanavyaya . Abhinavasōmēśōdayamabhimataphaḷadānadhuryyamendādaradiṁ prabhumodalāginnūrvvaru
mabhinavasōmēśvarāśramakkairttandar . vacana . baṁdanēśvaranu bhuvanabhāsvaranuṁ viśvēśvaranumappamabhinavasōmēśvarana kaṁḍu niṭiḷataṭaparigha
ṭitakarakamaḷakuṭmaḷarāgi nāmidēvarggaṁgabhōgādinimittamāgi vṛttiyaṁ bīruvamappadāryyarumavāryyavīryyarumacaḷita
dhairyyaruṁ brahmacaryyavratadhuryyarumappācāryyarāgalvērkumantappavarindamīdharmmaṁ svadharmmadinnaḍegumantappavarumī kalikāḷadoḷu
kalikālabhayapaḷāyitadharmmācaraṇaruṁ gurukuḷasamuddharaṇaruṁ kaśmīradēvasantānavārddhivarddhanasudhākararumamaḷaguṇākararumappa lakuḷīśvarapaṁḍitaravara santānamentendoḍe . kanda . nīrāgarssakaḷāgamavāridhipāragaraśēṣaśāstrapravaṇarkkāruṇikareṁdu pogaḷguṁ
dhāriṇi kaśmīradēvaraṁ sādaradi . Āmunipuṁgavaśiṣyarkkāmamadakrōdhalōbhavarjjitākhiḷaprāmāṇikajanavaṁdyarssōmēśvarapaṁḍitarddharā
maṁḍaḷadoḷ . tacchiṣyarharahāsasvacchayaśarssakaḷaśāstrapāragarudyatpṛcchayajayigaḷu jagadoḷatucchaguṇarjñānaśakti
paṁḍitadēvar . vacana . Ā tārkikacakravartti paṁḍitadēvāparanāmadhēyarappa jñānaśaktipaṁḍitara śiṣyar . kaṁda . vidyāvadhūmu
khābjapradyōtanarāgamapra vīṇarvvijitapradyumnaprābalyarssadyōjātabratīśvararbhbhūtaḷadoḷ . Avara śiṣyaru . sakaḷāgamavidarā
śāprakaṭitakīrttigaḷaśēṣaśāstrapravaṇarmmakaradhvajaśauryyahararllakuḷīśvarapaṁḍitarddharitrītaḷadoḷ . vacana . Intu negaḷdabhinavasō
mēśvaradēvasthānadācāryyarappa śrīmallakuḷīśvarapaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakammāḍi cāḷukyavikramavariṣada 24 neya pra
māthisaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha śuddha paurnnamāsi Ādityavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānedhāraṇajapasamā
dhiśīlasaṁpannaru . sujanaprasannaru . Ātipavitranijagōtraśatapatramitraru . manumunicaritraru . śrutismratītihāsaparāśarādimunipraṇī
tapurāṇasaṁdarbhbhaśaraṇaru brāhmadharmmasamuddharaṇaru . momāṁsādiśāstrapārāvārapārōttaraṇadhuryyaru Acalitadhairyyaru dīnābhi
janamanīṣimānavanikāyaśukakuḷaphaḷitasahakāraru śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraru . Agaṇitaguṇagaṇadviguṇitayaśaḥppaṭalapāṁḍu
ritadigvēdaṁḍaru kadanapracaṁḍaru kalikālakhaḷaprabhāvābhibhūtabhītidhāvitadharmmasamuddharaṇadhaurēyaru . satyarādhēyaru . Abhinava
sōmēśvaradēvacaraṇasarasīruhārādhanāsamāsāditavaraprasādaru parasukhapramōdaru . Ityādināmāvaḷīvirājamānarappa
śrīmatkuṟuvarttiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaminnūrvvaru paramaprēmadiṁdabhinavasōmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ tapōdhanarā
hāradānakkammāṭakūṭakkaṁ taṟaṁbeya polada hagaraṇigana bāgiṁ paḍuvaṇa deseyali dinaguṇigana mūṟu mattaru verasu koṭṭa guṇi
gana mattar 15 . Allimmūḍalu sēnabōva dēvamayyana keyyiṁ baḍagaṇa deseyalu sāṁdara sūrayyana kaiyyalu māṟugoṁḍu bi
ṭṭa guṇigana mattar 6 . Aṁtaraḍuṁ sthaḷadalidusahitaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭa guṇigana mattar 21 . mattammūḍaṇa baṭṭeyalu tṛṇakā
ṣṭhaśākaphaḷammodalāgi barppa vastuviṁge suṁkamumaṁ koṭṭaru . Ūroḍeya kāḷiyaṇnantōṁṭa vasugeyumīreḍeya makki sahitammūṟuṁ
sthaḷadalu guṇigana mattar 2 . gōviṁdarasana kāḷiyaṇna makki mattar 1 . kamma 600 mākaḷayyana dāsiyaṇna makki guṇigana mattar 1 . kattige
ya sāliyaṇna makki kamma . 100 . māḷigeya tippaṇna makki kamma . 300 . Īśvarayyana kāḷiyaṇna makki kamma . 200 . cavuṁḍayaṣaṇaṁgiya
ra magammārayyanuṁ tammaṁ dēvapayyanumavara maganīśvarayyanu makki kamma . 300 . Avaraḷiyammuddeyaṣaṇaṁgiyuntammaṁ cākaṇnanuṁ markki ka
mma . 200 . Ēraṁḍaranāraṇayyammarkkikamma . 200 . Avara tīkaṇnaṁ markki kamma . 200 . kāḷidāsakramiṁtaru markki kamma . 600 . maunada māhaṇnaṁ harakuṁda
ra tīkimayyana kāḷiya kaiyyalu koṁḍu biṭṭa markki kamma . 400 . Antu markki guṇigana mattar 7 . kamma 400 dharmmarasana dēkaṇnanuṁ vāmaṇnanuṁ haraḷagu
ṇigana mattar 2 . hervvāruva cavuṁḍamayyanuṁ dēvapayyanuṁ haraḷuguṇigana matta 2 . haṁcikabbeya dēvapayyanuṁ sōgeya śivaṇnanumoṁ
dē sthaḷadalu haraḷu mattaru 2 . Antu haraḷuguṇigana mattar 6 . cikkasā(ṁ)viyaṇnaṁ keṁgāḍu guṇigana mattar 5 . mābalayyana tīkaṇnanuntammaṁ kāḷi
dāsiyuṁ kaḷaṟuguṇigana mattar 1 . kattigeyadāva(ṁ)ṇnaṁ kaḷaṟu guṇigana mattar 1 . Antu kaḷaṟu guṇigana mattar 2 . harakuṁdara bammaṇnanuntammāmā
haṇnanuṁ gaḻde kamma . 120 . taḷāṟa caṁdiyaṇnaṁ gaḻde kamma 125 . mōnara dāseyakṣaṇaṁgi gaḻde kamma . 120 . Īśvarayyana bammaṇnaṁ gaḻde kamma . 120 .
harakuṁdara tīkimayyana magaṁ kāḷidāsiyumavaraḷiyaṁ saṁkaṇnanuṁ hāṁvasigeyappaṇnanuṁ gaḻde guṇiganamattar 2 . mābalayyana tīkaṇna
nuntammaṁ kāḷiyaṇnanummārayyanuṁ gaṟdekamma . 150 . huḷiyakabbeya sōvaṇnanuṁ dēcikabbeyīśvarayyanuṁ sāṁdara kētaṇnanumavara he
bbaṇnanumavara sūrayyanumoṁde vasuge gaḻde kamma . 700 . Eṟekajjaṁ gaḻde kamma . 300 . maṇigāṟa rēciseṭṭiyuṁ kalliseṭṭiyuṁ gaḻdekamma . 300 . Antu
gaḻde guṇagana mattar 4 . kamma . 130 . biḍivāḷayyana cāvaṇnaṁ dēvara hūdōṭakke bādumbeya haḷḷadim mūḍalu maḷavada makki guṇigana mattar 1 .
duddimayyanamagaṁ padmanābhantoṟeya hattiralīśvarayyana markkiyiṁ paḍavalu koṭṭa tuḷukevaṭṭina markki kamma . 45 . Intī biṭṭa keyyummaṁ ga
ḻdeyumaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāninnūrvvaruṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . kaṁda . gavaṟegaḷaynūrvvarumabhinavasōmēśaṁge miṁdina
lu paṇamoṁdaṁ dhruvamāge pasuṁbege hāgavaneṟakade karttayalli bēḷeyanittar . mudadiṁdaynūrvvarppudu modalartthamanittaroldu sō
mēśaṁginnidanāvanorvvanaḷidavanadayannarakakkepōgi sukhadiṁdirkku . Aṁgaḍiyoḷu sūṁṭige bhattaṁ gāṇadoḷoṁdu soṭigeṇneyanitta
rggaṁgātaraṁgabhaṁgāliṁgitajāṭaṁge paradaruntelligaru . mattaṁ sōmēśaṁge suvṛttarpperjjuṁkadoḍeyalirvvarmmudadiṁdittarddavasada suṁkamanattaḷagaṁ sōṁvimayya
nuṁ bīraṇanu . pesaṟuppu kaḍale gōdhuve minupeḷḷeṁbivaṟa pēṟu mūvattarkkondeseva davasakkamārppindosadirppattarkke koṭṭarondammudadi . pattiya maḷavegaḷo
ḷu nālvattarkkondante marada tappakkaṁ nālvattarkkondaṁ koṭṭarmmattidanāraḷidaraḷidaraṁ yamanaṟigu . kuṟuvarttigrāmadiniṁ poṟamaḍutuṁ pugutumirppa dhā
nyakkellā neṟe partti teppaminitakkaṟidittarssuṁkamaṁ karaṁ sādaradi . Aḍakeyelevēṟoḷitta mṛḍage nālvattu pēṟoḷondammudadiṁ kiḍipenidaneṁba pātakaneḍevu
du gaḍa vīciyoḷu kuṭuṁbiyenikku mattantaḷāṟaṁ caṁdiyaṇnaniṁ piriyanudayaṇnaṁ gardde kamma . 125 . kariyadēcimayyana magaṁ vāsiyaṇnaṁ garddeka
mma 100 . Avaraṇnaṁ vaijaṇnaṁ gardde kamma . 150 . suṁkaverggaḍe caṭimayyana magaṁ barmmadēvayyanāyaiyyana putraṁ haradadūroḍeyaṁ cāvuṁḍa
rāyaṁ harada datti gaṭṭada keḷage gaḻde guṇigana mattaru . 1 . Adaṟa sīmāsaṁbandhamentendoḍe mūḍalu dibba baḍagalu paḷḷa paḍuvalu bāyikalu teṁka
lu bhaṁḍivaṭṭi . svasti śrīpādada mārasiṁgayanāyakara magaṁ nāgadēva tannaṁśada Eraḍu hattiyereya baḷiya tōṁṭa vasugeya gadde kamma 225 dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dē
vara nivēdyakke koṭṭu gaṁdha dhūpakke 1 gadyāṇa ponnaṁ biṭṭanadaṟa kaḷāntaradiṁ naḍeyisuvar
Intī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavarvvāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ modalāgirppa puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileya paṁcaratnadiṁ
khaciyisi sāsirvvarvvēdapāragargge sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu koṭṭa puṇyama rapparī dharmmama varā puṇyatī
rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileyumaṁ sā sirvvarvvēdapāragarumaṁ sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdaḷida ṣamityāhurddēva
svaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . dātārassulabhā lōkē rakṣitārastu durllabhāḥ sahasrāṇāṁ rakṣitai
kō viśiṣyatē . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ
sagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāvinaṟpārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . vidyāvadhūśravaṇabhāsurakarṇnapūraḥ śrīkāḷidāsavibudhā
patēstanūjaḥ . sōmēśaśāsanavacōracanāṁ vidhāya śrīkaṇṭhasūriralikhadvibudhairvvicāryyam . guṇapā ryyapraṇītaśā
strōktiyide kaluvesanaṁ lakṣaṇayuktamāgiralu dhāraṇiyoḷu gulugōjanaṟivaneṁdeḷe pogaḷguṁ . bare surarāja tirīṭa
ghaṭitapadaśāsanamaṁ sthiramāgire mudadiṁ kaṁḍarisidanācaṁdratārakaṁ kāḷōjaṁ . śubhaṁ bhūyādabhinavasōmēśvarabhaktānāṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
